calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murphy for and with Roberta Molina.

Mr. Murphy stated that his Client searched through the documents and that she was unable to discover any bank records. In addition, Mr. Murphy argued that the bank would not have turned the account over to his Client unless it was a joint account and stated that the bank was refusing to sign anything due to liabilty issues. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Continued To May-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murphy for and with Roberta Molina. Norma Fortino (Objector) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Murphy stated that Mr. Lim (Bank employee) could not find anything with regard to how the Eureka bank account was held and requested a two week continuance for Ms. Molina to do a search for bank records in the Decedent's home. The matter was continued to May 26, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Continued To May-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2010 Continued To May-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murphy for and with Roberta Molina. Norma Fortino (Niece of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to who owned the US Bank CD account before the date of the Decedent's death. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Continued To Mar-10-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Merrill Emerick for and with Norma Fortina (Objector). John Murphy for Roberta Molina (Petitioner).

Mr. Murphy brought documents addressing some of the issues raised in the Examiner's notes and addressed them in open court. The Court directed Mr. Murphy to file said documents and to provide copies to Mr. Emerick. The Court also suggested Mr. Murphy speak to the Examiner to see how the issues could be addressed and encouraged Counsel to meet and talk prior to the next hearing. The matter was continued to March 10, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Continued To Feb-10-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Continued To Feb-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Continued To Dec-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murphy for and with Roberta Molina. Merrill Emerick for and with Norma Fortino.

Mr. Murphy stated that he just received the Examiner's notes on Friday. Mr. Emerick stated that the $10,000.00 should be restored before the Estate is closed. Mr. Murphy stated that they would need the distribution to be done to be able to pay back the $10,000.00. Mr. Emerick stated that they don't want the Estate to close without a date set for the return of the money. The Court ordered the amended account to be filed by November 24, 2009. The Court then continued the matter to December 9, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The First And Final Account
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Off Calendar

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murphy for and with Roberta Meyer Molina. Norma Fortino (Objector) in propria persona.

Ms. Fortino expressed some concerns as set forth on the record. Mr. Murphy stated that he would urge his client to perform her duties and noted that they had received the Examiner's notes. The Court stated that Ms. Fortino needs to account to the Objector and instructed Mr. Murphy to file a new proof of service. The Court then denied the petition without prejudice. Ms. Fortino stated that her brother is deceased, addressed the recently filed declaration, and stated that the house was free and clear. The Court ordered the First and Final Account to be filed by September 2, 2009. Status on the filing of the First and Final Account is set for September 8, 2009. The Court stated if it is not on file Ms. Molina may be removed.

Judge: Raymond J. Arata Jr. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
